recommendations.title: Brubaker
recommendations.overview: The new warden of a small prison farm in Arkansas tries to clean it up of corruption after initially posing as an inmate.

recommendations.title: The Pope of Greenwich Village

recommendations.title: The Amityville Horror

recommendations.title: Cool Hand Luke

recommendations.title: Will & Harper
recommendations.overview: When Will Ferrell's good friend Harper comes out as a trans woman, they take a road trip to bond and reintroduce Harper to the country as her true self.

recommendations.title: Primal Fear

recommendations.title: Blackmail
recommendations.overview: When Dev finds about his wife's affair, he starts blackmailing her and her lover but the blackmail game backfires on him.

recommendations.title: The Best Man

recommendations.title: The Maltese Falcon
recommendations.overview: A private detective takes on a case that involves him with three eccentric criminals, a beautiful liar, and their quest for a priceless statuette.

recommendations.title: Stephanie
recommendations.overview: After a mysterious global crisis, a young girl is left alone to hide from a malevolent power that stalks her home. Her parents eventually return and the struggle begins to save their daughter.
